name: audit-dead-code.sh
description: Run knip with the JSON reporter to find unused files, dependencies, devDependencies, and exports in one pass.

name: check-circular-deps.mjs
description: Use madge to detect circular dependency chains across TypeScript and JavaScript files.

name: audit-package-engines.mjs
description: Compare package.json engines.node against the current Node runtime before installing or deploying packages.

name: find-console-logs.sh
description: Fast ripgrep sweep for console.log, console.warn, and debugger statements outside tests and build output.

name: find-inline-styles.sh
description: Find React inline style object literals such as style={{ ... }} so styles can be extracted.

name: check-missing-types.sh
description: Compare runtime dependencies with @types/* devDependencies and warn about likely missing TypeScript definitions.

name: list-untracked-files.sh
description: List git-untracked files that may need to be reviewed or added before a commit.

name: write-checkpoint.sh
description: Write the current plan, findings, and git status to .thunder-state.json before approval pauses.

name: read-checkpoint.sh
description: Read .thunder-state.json after approval so the agent can resume with the saved plan and findings.

name: sync-env-files.mjs
description: Compare .env.example keys with .env and report missing environment variables without printing secret values.
